User.title: User
User.description: User profile with registration details and subscription status under Iranian Café Bazaar rules.

userId.description: Unique user identifier from Firebase Authentication (represented by a string).

isPremium.description: True if the user has an active Golden premium plan.

premiumExpiry.description: Midnight timestamp when premium membership expires.

Advertisement.title: Advertisement
Advertisement.description: Dynamic advertisement banner displayed on the home page.

imageUrl.description: Direct URL link to the banner image.

targetUrl.description: Web link or phone number link when a user clicks the banner.

title.description: Optional ad caption, title, or sponsor name.

isActive.description: Deactivate or activate the ad on the fly.

isVideo.description: Set to true to render this advertisement as a short video.

/users/{userId}.description: Direct user profile documents queried by UID.

/advertisements/{adId}.description: Collection of advertisements managed directly from Firebase Console.
